'''Clis Prithann''' was a round-faced [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|woman]] who was [[Eppie Belden]]'s nurse during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="The Truce at Bakura" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'' {{1st}}
